Apple tree near northern front of school.
Near bridge over river, north side of street. Spotted what look like ripe at end of sept. Falling Fruit season: August-October.

Trio of crabapples in front of yellow house. Access: Private.

Can see red apples on the tree when ripe, haven't tried stopping to sample yet.

Many different kinds and sizes of crabapple here, including one at the northmost edge of fenced area overhanging the sidewalk with fruit larger than a quarter! Also a good spread of boneset (Eupatorium perfoliatum) inside fence.
Some variety of apple in front of building north of road. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Some type of red apple, overhangs backyard fence. Access: Private but overhanging.
